title: cyperus mortonii
intro: Cyperus mortonii, also known as Morton's Cyperus or False Flax, is a type of sedge that is native to North America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots and rhizomes, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus mortonii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
